blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Can I say something and you won't make it weird?

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I've been looking forward to Thursdays.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: Like — specifically. During the week. When things are hard I just think 'Thursday, steps, it'll be fine.'

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You look forward to sitting on the steps?

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I look forward to you being on the steps. Don't make it into something smaller than that.
There it was. The version of her that didn't make herself smaller.
I'd been looking forward to Thursdays too. Every single one. But I hadn't said it like that. I'd just let it accumulate quietly in me like something I wasn't ready to name.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I've been looking forward to them too.
She leaned back on her palms. Looked up at the sky for a second. When she looked back at me the amber light was on her face and she was smiling.
